concerns.description: Header/footer elements retained in output (1): North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality | Divisio
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=1. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

The source document underlines 'Certified Mail' and 'Return Receipt Requested' to indicate emphasis at the top of the letter (and 'Certified Mail' on subsequent pages). The extraction JSON captures the text but does not preserve the underline formatting (e.g., via HTML <u> tags or similar expected representation), resulting in a loss of visual emphasis.
